query_title: Along with the Gods: The Two Worlds

recommendations.title: Along with the Gods: The Last 49 Days
recommendations.overview: As the deceased soul Ja-hong and his three afterlife guardians prepare for their remaining trials for reincarnation, the guardians soon come face to face with the truth of their tragic time on Earth 1,000 years earlier.

recommendations.title: The Moon
recommendations.overview: In 2029, Korea's lunar probe Woori embarks on a historic journey to the moon, capturing global attention.

recommendations.title: 200 Pounds Beauty
recommendations.overview: Hanna, an overweight lip-sync artist who ghost sings for Ammy, a known pop diva, secretly likes Han Sang-jun. When Ammy humiliates Hanna in Han's presence, Hanna decides to undergo a cosmetic surgery.

recommendations.title: Parasite
recommendations.overview: All unemployed, Ki-taek's family takes peculiar interest in the wealthy and glamorous Parks for their livelihood until they get entangled in an unexpected incident.

recommendations.title: Vanishing Time: A Boy Who Returned
recommendations.overview: Days after her friends disappear during a trip to a mysterious cave, a girl is approached by a grown man claiming to be one of her missing pals.

recommendations.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
recommendations.overview: Peter Quill, still reeling from the loss of Gamora, must rally his team around him to defend the universe along with protecting one of their own. A mission that, if not completed successfully, could quite possibly lead to the end of the Guardians as

recommendations.title: Pretty Guardian Sailor Moon Eternal the Movie Part 2
recommendations.overview: While under the care of the Outer Sailor Guardians, Hotaru begins to age rapidly. Then, the time comes for all the Sailor Guardians to reunite!

recommendations.title: Beasts Clawing at Straws
recommendations.overview: A struggling restaurant owner, caring for his sick mom, finds a bag of cash in a sauna locker, while a customs officer gets into trouble when his girlfriend runs off with money he borrowed from a loan shark.

recommendations.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2
recommendations.overview: The Guardians must fight to keep their newfound family together as they unravel the mysteries of Peter Quill's true parentage.

recommendations.title: Trollhunters: Rise of the Titans
recommendations.overview: The Guardians of Arcadia reunite to battle the nefarious Arcane Order, who've reawakened the primordial Titans.
recommendations.director: Johane Matte, Andrew L. Schmidt, Francisco Ruiz Velasco
